query:
SELECT c.numeroContrato, c.totalRentas, c.rentaActual, c.montoMensual, c.fechaInicio, c.fechaTermino, c.plazo
FROM contratos c
WHERE c.empresa = 'tim_transp' AND c.numeroContrato = '342'
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 344B2FJrSHdkSxo.0ab51ce41b50 --database bUSGvjzrZfvVXNhQ347wq4 --execute SELECT c.numeroContrato, c.totalRentas, c.rentaActual, c.montoMensual, c.fechaInicio, c.fechaTermino, c.plazo
FROM contratos c
WHERE c.empresa = 'tim_transp' AND c.numeroContrato = '342'
LIMIT 1;
